labels.notes: Carl Edgar Grieve 1:04pm — left peroneal nerve entrapment at fibular head; ONE injection performed (PRP + local anesthetic to peroneal nerve). DEFECTS: (1) Class B dx 729 (Fibrositis/myositis) wrong — should be 355 (mononeuritis of lower limb) or 354 (mononeuritis upper limb / nerve entrapment). Tools-model likely defaulted to 729 because peripheral neuritis terms aren't in DX_SYNONYMS table. (2) Class F BILLING DOUBLE-COUNT: billing has BOTH G231A (nerve block, somatic peripheral) AND G372A (IM/SC injection with visit). G231A is correct. G372A is inappropriate — the local anesthetic delivered AS PART OF a nerve block is a component, not a separately billable IM injection. ROOT CAUSE: G231A and G372A live in different exclusion families in rule_engine.rs (no mutual-exclusion rule). Fix: when NerveBlockPeripheral / NerveBlockOccipital / NerveBlockParavertebral is present in same encounter, suppress ImInjectionWithVisit (G372A).
